message:
fix(e2e): Fix bugs in E2E logging infrastructure

Reviewed code with fresh eyes and fixed:

1. cli-runner.ts:
   - Replaced require() with static import (was mixing CommonJS/ESM)
   - Added process.kill() on timeout to prevent zombie processes
   - Added clearTimeout() when process completes normally

2. playwright-logger.ts:
   - Removed unused imports (writeFileSync, dirname)
   - Fixed content type for JSONL files (application/x-ndjson)

3. test-logger.ts:
   - Added VALID_LOG_LEVELS set for env var validation
   - Now validates E2E_LOG_LEVEL before using it
   - Removed unused BOLD constant

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
